title: panic after incorrect `--secret=id` parameter
body:
### Issue Description

podman panics when providing an incomplete `--secret` parameter

### Steps to reproduce the issue

> podman --version
podman version 5.8.1
> # In a directory with a valid `Dockerfile`
> podman build --secret=id=,src .
panic: runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1
...

### Describe the results you received

panic: runtime error: index out of range [1] with length 1

goroutine 13 [running]:
github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/parse.Secrets({0xc0006c2710, 0x1, 0x0?})
        github.com/containers/buildah/pkg/parse/parse.go:1091 +0x568
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.newExecutor(_, {_, _}, {_, _}, {{0x0, 0x0}, {0xc000116b80, 0x1c}, 0x0, ...}, ...)
        github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/executor.go:200 +0x727
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.buildDockerfilesOnce({_, _}, {_, _}, _, {_, _}, {{0x0, 0x0}, {0xc000116b80, ...}, ...}, ...)
        github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/build.go:429 +0x967
github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah.BuildDockerfiles.func2()
        github.com/containers/buildah/imagebuildah/build.go:269 +0x4cd
github.com/hashicorp/go-multierror.(*Group).Go.func1()
        github.com/hashicorp/go-multierror/group.go:23 +0x5f
created by github.com/hashicorp/go-multierror.(*Group).Go in goroutine 1
        github.com/hashicorp/go-multierror/group.go:20 +0x79

### Describe the results you expected

I did not expect a panic. Maybe an error if the parameter is mandatory.

### Podman in a container

Yes

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

I found it using podman version 4.9.3 on WSL with Ubuntu 24.04.4 LTS.
I tested it with the latest podman image to get the latest version. (using podman run on the above environment.)

### Additional information

The sting provided with `id=` does not matter.
